title: 5 Signs Your Business Has Outgrown DIY Video Content
excerpt: There's a moment where DIY video stops being scrappy and starts being a quiet drain on time, reputation, and opportunity. Here are five signs you've reached that point.
author: diego-cerquera

content.alt: Cinema cameras for professional video production
content.caption: Professional production gives you back the time your team should spend on their actual expertise

seo.title: 5 Signs You've Outgrown DIY Video | When to Hire a Video Company
seo.description: 5 signs your business has outgrown DIY video content. When to make the shift to professional video production for better results and less overhead.
